Fig. 7. Cytotoxicity evaluation by the PI uptake (A, B), resazurin (C, D), and MTT (E, F) assays of THP-1 macrophage-like cells (M0 and M1, respectively) exposed for
24 h to 250 µg/mL of empty and P. gingivalis (Pg) extract-loaded PLGA-CS NPs with increasing initial amounts of extract antigens (250, 500, 750, 1000 µg) (mean ± S.
D., n = 6). (K-) negative control (culture medium); (K+) positive control (SDS, 1 mg/mL). Statistically significant differences between the negative control group (K-)
and other groups are presented as: ****p < 0.0001, ***p < 0.001, **p < 0.01, *p < 0.05.
